svg.text: Every pitch from 2015-2025 is ingested via pybaseball.
Min 300 pitches/season to qualify. Aggregated to
Each pitcher-season becomes a 14-D feature vector.
Pitch mix captures WHAT they throw.
Outcome profile captures HOW it plays.
RHP and LHP are split before clustering —
Gaussian Mixture Model clusters every pitcher-
season into one of 26 archetypes. RHP and LHP
Minimum K=10 enforced per hand for granularity.
pitchers (>40% SI, <10% FF) extracted into R_UT/L_UT.
Each cluster gets a human-readable name built from
three components: pitch-mix identity, outcome modifier,
and role label. Medoid pitcher used as exemplar.
Every hitter's performance is cross-tabulated against
all 26 pitcher archetypes. wOBA maps to Matchup Score
Min 5 PA vs archetype to generate MS.
Uncharted batters (no data) flagged as NRI with grey badge.
4 PA/batter assumed | Rate stats × PA → H, HR, K, BB, TB | SB/CS per-PA rate × PA
Baserunning: recency-weighted (2× most recent year) | 798 batters indexed | batter_baserunning.json
BaseRuns converts lineup-level rate stats into
projected run totals for each team.
Each batter's MS-derived wOBA becomes projected
rate stats (BA, HR/PA, K%, BB%) × 4 assumed PA.
year = 2× weight. SB adds runners + advancement,
CS adds outs. Each batter's steal threat modeled.
+ edge → home value | - edge → away value
Projected margins compared to consensus market lines
Games with edge > threshold flagged as picks.
Strong edges (2× threshold) highlighted for conviction.
Data baked inline. Daily cron via GitHub Actions → morellosims.com/mlbsim
